# Database Schema

## 12 Core Database Tables

events (hook events with tool_input/response, seq_num, success, cost), sessions (summaries with model/tokens/cost), prompts (user turns with event ranges, cost, duration), collector_errors (hook errors), components (skill/agent inventory from filesystem), cl_projects (registered projects with last_seen), scan_results (setup scanner reports), auto_evolves (observer-detected patterns with confidence/status), daily_reviews (Opus analysis suggestions), knowledge_entries (LLM-extracted project understanding with status), kg_vault_hashes (content hashes for vault files), kg_sync_state (KV state for graph sync). Events table has: timestamp, session_id, event_type, name, detail, tokens, cost, prompt_id (FK), project_name.

_Source: `CLAUDE.md`_
